scl.title: Safety Culture Ladder

toolbox.title: The Toolbox for certification consultants.

scl.title: Safety Culture Ladder
scl.subtitle: AI interviews that really capture the culture, ready for SCL certification from 1 July 2026.

what.title: What is the Safety Culture Ladder?
what.body: The Safety Culture Ladder (SCL) is a certification standard that measures how safety culture is embedded in an organisation. Not just the rules and procedures, but the actual behaviour: how people talk about safety, what they do when things get tense, and how that runs through the whole organisation, from leadership to the shop floor. The ladder has five steps, from reactive to proactive, and shows where an organisation stands and what the next step looks like.

who.title: Who is it for, and why now?
who.body: From 1 July 2026, the Safety Culture Ladder becomes mandatory certification for companies working in contracting and infrastructure. Major clients in construction like BAM already treat the SCL as a hard requirement. That means there is a concrete and urgent demand from companies that want to take it seriously, not just tick a box.

why.title: Why with Helpr?
why.body1: The standard SCL tool stops at a questionnaire. Scores, but little context.
why.body2: Helpr goes further. With open interview questions we surface what scores alone don't tell you: the real-life examples, the nuances, the things employees say when given the space. That delivers first-hand insights a consultant can truly use, not just as evidence for a report, but also as starting points for the improvement conversation.
why.body3: The results are automatically turned into structured documentation. What remains for the consultant: assessing on content, steering, and having the conversation that actually matters.
why.body4: On top of that, you get concrete pointers per sub-theme about what's needed to move to step 3, 4 or 5. Ideal as the basis for your action plan.

how.title: How does it work? AI voice agents
how.intro: The heart of our approach is one-on-one conversations, led by an AI voice agent. A real conversation at a moment that works for the employee or manager: at the office, on the building site, or in the car heading back.

context.title: Builds context
context.body: During the conversation the AI interviewer discusses the role of the person they're talking to and the sub-themes that should be covered. As the conversation unfolds, the AI agent builds on it by referring back to earlier answers and probing where it gets interesting.

probe.title: Probes where it counts
probe.body: When someone says 'safety is important here', the follow-up comes: when did you notice that last, what happened, what did your manager do? That's how the real examples emerge that distinguish the SCL steps.

safe.title: A safe setting
safe.body: People often speak more openly to an AI than to an external auditor or their own manager. Answers are processed anonymously, which noticeably increases willingness to be honest.

scale.title: Scale without compromise
scale.body: Whether it's ten conversations or a hundred, the AI agent runs them all at the same pace, with the same patience, and the same depth.

dossier.body: After the interviews, the consultant receives a structured dossier: qualitative findings per sub-theme, organised per layer of the organisation, supported with anonymised examples from the interviews. Per sub-theme, the steps needed to move to a higher tier are also called out. Ready to assess, not to build from scratch.

cta.title: Curious what Helpr can do for your SCL trajectories?

hero.subtitle: We support certification trajectories with realistic AI interviews, without changing how you work. You stay in charge. We make it easier, not different. So you gain more time for the real advising.

partners.heading: Trusted by consultancies across the Netherlands

industries.title: Built for every industry.
industries.body: Whether it's construction, IT, transport, healthcare or financial services. Our AI toolbox adapts to your sector and to your client's vernacular.

grant.title: We received an ElevenLabs Grant. Recognition of our innovative approach to compliance.

pain.title: Planning, interviewing, writing up, documenting…
pain.body1: You've got a lot on your plate. And then there's the actual advising.
pain.body2: We've seen it. We've thought about it. We've built _the_ solution.

promise.title: You decide where to deploy Helpr. We support every trajectory.
promise.body: Every QHSE consultant has their own approach, refined over years. We leave it intact. Our AI only speeds up what can be sped up, you decide where.

cherrypick.title: Cherry-pick modules
cherrypick.body: Use the parts that save you time and create value. Stakeholder analysis, emissions inventory, risk assessment. Standalone or bundled.

fullTrack.title: Complete trajectory
fullTrack.body: Ready-made tracks from scope to audit. Hand the module to your client, they walk through it, you keep an eye on the process.

initial.title: Initial trajectory
initial.body: For new certifications. Built up step by step, from scope to audit-ready output.

updates.title: Periodic updates
updates.body: Existing clients through their annual cycle effortlessly. Faster, with less repetition.

core.title: Realistic, natural AI interviews.
core.body: No forms, no fill-in fields. Your client has an actual conversation with our AI, as if a seasoned consultant were sitting beside them. The AI listens, asks follow-ups where it matters and captures the essence. Comfortable: in the car, at the desk, or in between meetings.

voice.title: Voice-first
voice.body: Your client talks the way they would to a colleague. Comfortable, in the car or at the desk.

followup.title: Asks smart follow-ups
followup.body: The AI understands context, spots gaps and asks natural follow-ups until the essence is captured.

domain.title: Speaks your client's language
domain.body: Your client speaks their own trade jargon. The AI understands it and engages in your client's language. No standard-speak, just the language of the business.

flexible.title: On your schedule
flexible.body: No time pressure means better answers. Pause, resume, add, whenever fits your day.

audience.title: For the QHSE consultant who wants more impact.

experienced.title: Focus on what truly matters
experienced.body: Let us handle the collection work. You give advice, walk through the data with your client, and make sure the auditor leaves with a big smile.

junior.title: Track-ready from day one
junior.body: You don't need years of experience to run a solid trajectory. Ready-made tracks you simply hand to your client. They walk through it, you stay in control.

usecase.title: Finally a way to analyse an entire organisation.
usecase.body: Query your whole organisation, from the shop floor to leadership to external stakeholders. No more scheduling jigsaws: you send the invitations, clients respond on their own time. Speed and quality finally go hand in hand.

quote.text: I was truly blown away. The quality of the conversation was truly incredible.
quote.author: Frank van de Beek

toolbox.title: The toolbox for certification consultants.
toolbox.subtitle: Modular, scalable and constantly growing. For every ISO standard and ladder, from the CO₂ Performance Ladder to ISO 27001 and the Safety Culture Ladder. Use standalone or as a complete track.
toolbox.growthTitle: And this is just the beginning.
toolbox.growthBody: New modules drop every week. Got a wish? Let us know. We build along with the market.

select.title: Pick a module
select.body: One module or a full track. For every standard, every phase.

invite.title: Send the invite
invite.body: One click. Your client receives a personal link with clear instructions.

collect.title: We collect
collect.body: AI-driven interviews. Comfortable, in the car or at the desk. We handle the structure.

export.title: Audit-ready output
export.body: Direct as downloadable, editable documents in the perfect house style of both your consultancy and your client.

data.title: Structured information, ready for your management system.
data.body: Behind the scenes we store every answer, source and claim as structured information. Searchable, traceable and linkable. Soon accessible via API, so your management system gets direct access.

model.title: Unique data model
model.body: Every claim, source and statement captured separately and linked together.

api.title: API-ready (soon)
api.body: Live data straight into your management system, no longer in separate documents.

searchable.title: Searchable archive
searchable.body: All conversations, evidence and analyses in one searchable place.

output.title: Word documents in your house style.
output.body: A finished Word document, fully styled to your consultancy and your client. Open, review and deliver.

editable.title: Editable Word document
editable.body: Open in Word the way you're used to. Tweak as needed, you stay in control.

evidence.title: Clearly traceable
evidence.body: Every claim linked to the right department or stakeholder. The auditor immediately knows the origin.

structure.title: Audit-ready structure
structure.body: Chapters, headings and indexing align with the standard from the start. No restructuring needed.

hero.description: At Helpr.ai we bridge the gap between complex business challenges and the power of applied AI. We believe technology is most valuable when it relieves people from repetitive basic work, giving expertise the room it deserves.

mission.title: What drives us
mission.quote: We capture what people say and turn it into what auditors need.
mission.description: Collecting the right information within an organisation is often a headache: data is scattered across people, departments and documents. Helpr.ai automates this through structured AI interviews. We listen, extract the essence, and turn conversations into structured, audit-ready documentation.

team.title: The people behind Helpr.ai
team.subtitle: Together we're building the future of compliance automation.

jorien.description: Jorien focuses on the human side of technological transition. With her experience she ensures AI implementations are not only technically sound but truly land within the organisation.

jaap.description: Jaap is the driving force behind solutions that deliver immediate results. He translates complex visions into practical AI applications that improve the daily practice of consultants and clients.

erik.description: Erik is the expert on the underlying data and tech. He makes sure AI interviews lead to consistent, repeatable, technically high-quality output that auditors can build on.

cta.title: Ready for the next step?
cta.description: Helpr.ai doesn't replace the consultant. It automates the groundwork so you can work faster and smarter.

footer.tagline: The AI toolbox for certification consultants. We streamline trajectories so consultants can focus on real advice.
